bot_response:
🏷️ COMPLAINT CATEGORY: Theft / Stolen Property

🚨 PRIORITY LEVEL: MEDIUM

📋 REQUIRED DOCUMENTS:
- Aadhaar card
- FIR request letter
- Proof of ownership
- IMEI number (for phones)

🏢 WHERE TO FILE: Nearest police station, crime branch

⚡ ACTION: File the complaint within 24 hours

📌 SOURCE: Based on official complaint guidelines

user_complaint: i lost my money in online fraud
bot_response:
🏷️ COMPLAINT CATEGORY: Cybercrime / Online Fraud

🚨 PRIORITY LEVEL: HIGH

📋 REQUIRED DOCUMENTS:
- Screenshot of fraud
- Bank transaction details
- Aadhaar card
- Email/phone records

🏢 WHERE TO FILE: Cyber Crime Cell, cybercrime.gov.in

⚡ ACTION: File immediately, freeze bank account if money lost

📌 SOURCE: Based on official complaint guidelines

🏷️ COMPLAINT CATEGORY: Missing Person

🚨 PRIORITY LEVEL: VERY HIGH

📋 REQUIRED DOCUMENTS:
- Recent photograph
- Aadhaar card
- Last known location details
- Contact info

🏢 WHERE TO FILE: Nearest police station

⚡ ACTION: File a complaint immediately and call 100 for assistance

📌 SOURCE: Based on official complaint guidelines

🏷️ COMPLAINT CATEGORY: Domestic Violence / Family Abuse

🚨 PRIORITY LEVEL: HIGH

📋 REQUIRED DOCUMENTS:
- Aadhaar card
- Medical reports if any
- Witness details
- Photos of injury

🏢 WHERE TO FILE: Local police station, women helpline 1091, or one stop centre

⚡ ACTION: Immediately contact the local police station, women helpline 1091, or visit the one stop centre to file a complaint and seek assistance.

📌 SOURCE: Based on official complaint guidelines

🏷️ COMPLAINT CATEGORY: Lost Property

🚨 PRIORITY LEVEL: MEDIUM

📋 REQUIRED DOCUMENTS:
- FIR (First Information Report) application
- Identity proof (Aadhaar card, PAN card, etc.)
- Proof of ownership of the mobile phone (purchase receipt, etc.)

🏢 WHERE TO FILE: Local Police Station

⚡ ACTION: File a complaint immediately at the local police station and also call 112 for emergency assistance if the loss is recent and you suspect immediate misuse.

📌 SOURCE: Based on official complaint guidelines
